name: @wizz/gateway
description: wizz.video auth + metered LLM gateway (Hono + SQLite, systemd). Owns provider keys; every proxied call is session-checked, quota-checked, and written to usage_events. See docs/wizz-contracts.md for the HTTP surface (WS-B builds this from the stub).

scripts.build: esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=dist/index.mjs --external:better-sqlite3 --external:@node-rs/argon2 && mkdir -p dist/migrations && cp src/migrations/*.sql dist/migrations/
